summary: Compare traditional spider and AJAX spider coverage.
starter: # Record spider configuration and output counts
objectives: Run both spiders on the same target.
solutionOutline: Spider choice justified for the target app.
title: Lab 25: Spider Coverage Comparison (Iteration 3)
steps: Run the traditional spider from the target URL.
Run the AJAX spider with the same scope.
Compare results in the Sites Tree.
Note pages found only by one spider.
Decide which spider to use for deeper scans.
